description: [Shared] updateTicketInTransaction accepts suppressContactNotifications=true and updates/closes successfully
[Shared] updateTicketInTransaction accepts both flags true and succeeds
[Shared] updateTicketInTransaction rejects suppressInternalNotifications=true with contact flag falsy (validation error)
[Shared] ticketActions.ts mirror path rejects internal-without-contact identically
[Shared] TICKET_CLOSED payload carries both flags when set (both action paths)
[Shared] TICKET_UPDATED payload carries both flags when set
[Shared] TICKET_ASSIGNED payload carries both flags when set
[Shared] Events published without flags have both fields absent/false (backward-compatible payload)
[Shared] Zod schemas accept legacy payloads lacking the new fields and reject non-boolean values
[Shared] Flags on a status change that is neither close nor assign propagate but cause no error (no-op path)
[Shared] NotificationAccumulator preserves the flags across accumulation; handleAccumulatedTicketUpdates sees them; dedup keys unaffected
[Shared] ticket.closed and ticket.updated webhooks fire on silent ops and payloads contain both flags
[Shared] Workflow event on the Redis stream includes the flags for a silent op; SLA recording still occurs
[Shared] Activity entry for a silent close/update carries suppression metadata; a normal op carries none
[Shared] Timeline UI shows the 'silent' annotation on suppressed entries and none on normal ones
[Shared] Client-portal update/close request with suppression flags has them stripped/rejected; contact still notified
[A] handleTicketClosed with contact suppression sends no contact/client close email and no bundle-child requester email
[A] handleTicketClosed with contact-only suppression still emails assignee, internal watchers, additional agents
[A] handleTicketClosed with contact suppression skips external-watcher emails
[A] handleTicketClosed with both flags sends zero emails
[A] surveySubscriber skips the survey invitation on contact suppression and still sends without flags
[A] internalNotificationSubscriber skips client-portal contact notification on contact suppression (close)
[A] internalNotificationSubscriber skips staff in-app notifications on internal suppression but keeps them on contact-only (close)
[A] Closing a bundle master silently closes children with no child-requester contact emails; child close events carry the flags
[A] Normal close (no flags) sends the full pre-change recipient set (regression)
[B] handleTicketUpdated with contact suppression sends no ticket-updated-client email to the contact
[B] handleAccumulatedTicketUpdates (production path) with contact suppression sends no contact ticket-updated-client email
[B] TICKET_UPDATED external-watcher send skipped on contact suppression; internal sends kept on contact-only, dropped on full
[B] Silent bulk status change of N tickets sends zero contact update emails across the batch
[B] bulkAssignTickets silent: no team-assignment/first-assignment client email; internal assignment notified per level
[B] internalNotificationSubscriber TICKET_UPDATED case honors contact/internal gating
[B] Non-silent bulk update still notifies contacts for each ticket (regression)
[A/B] Suppression control: internal checkbox disabled until contact checked; unchecking contact clears+disables internal
[A/B] Suppression control renders helper text and kebab-case ids
[A/B] Entry hero Save with 'don't notify contact' threads flags into the batched update (no contact email)
[A/B] Grid hero Save with suppression threads flags into the batched update
[A/B] Suppression control resets to unchecked on every open (no sticky state)
[B] BulkChangeStatusDialog shows the suppression control and passes values to bulkUpdateTicketStatus
[B] BulkChangePriorityDialog shows the control and passes values through
[B] BulkAssignTicketsDialog shows the control and passes values through
[B] BulkSetDueDateDialog shows the control and passes values through
[B] Inline Move-to-Board dialog shows the control; moveTicketsToBoard receives and applies the flags to each ticket
[B] BulkAddTagsDialog shows NO suppression control (regression guard on scope)
[A] Migration adds both columns NOT NULL DEFAULT false; existing rows read false; migration guarded/re-runnable
[A] closeRuleActions persist and return both fields and reject internal-without-contact
[A] Auto-close rule settings UI round-trips the toggles (set, save, reload)
[A] autoCloseTicketsHandler under a suppressing rule closes aging tickets with no contact email and no survey
[A] Auto-close warning email skipped when rule suppresses contact; still sent for non-suppressing rules
[C] BentoTimelineTile/TicketBentoLayout onAddNewComment accept a closeStatusId argument
[C] closedStatusOptions are threaded into the grid composer and populate the Close status select
[C] Grid resolution comment with a chosen close status closes the ticket (status moves, closes_ticket metadata set)
[C] Resolution-close is blocked/validated by close rules when the board requires it
[C] Silent resolution-close (grid) sends no contact close notification; TICKET_CLOSED carries the flags
[C] Entry resolution composer exposes the suppression control and can close silently (parity)
[C] Resolution comment with no close status selected records is_resolution and does not change status (grid + entry)
[D] Grid hero: editing a field buffers a pending change and does not auto-persist (no 700ms commit)
[D] Grid hero shows a dirty state and registers the nav guard; navigating away with unsaved changes prompts
[D] Grid Save/Cancel bar appears only when dirty; Cancel opens discard confirmation and reverts pending changes
[D] Selecting a new board in grid clears status_id, category_id, subcategory_id
[D] Selecting a new board with a differing priority type clears priority_id
[D] Grid hero loads board-scoped statuses and categories for the pending board
[D] Grid hero renders a Category picker sourced from the effective board
[D] After board change, Save is disabled and a warning shows until a destination status is chosen
[D] Board change + destination status + category Save persists board+status+category in one batched write (analogous to TicketInfo.boardChangeStatusReselection test)
[D] On successful grid Save, pending buffers clear and originalTicketValues advances (no lingering dirty state)
[D] Grid save keyboard shortcut triggers the batched save; dirty fields are reported to the container for collab highlighting
[D] Grid live-conflict 'take theirs' for board clears the coupled fields
[D] Individual silent update from the grid hero Save (board/status/priority) sends no contact email
[Platform] Pseudo-locale generation + translation validation pass with the new i18n keys
[Platform] Suppression gate points emit the 'skipped due to suppression' log line
[Platform] v1 API update/close endpoint accepts the optional flags and suppresses accordingly (or documented N/A)
[E2E] Silent individual close (hero): no contact email/survey/portal notification, but webhook + workflow + timeline + internal notifications present
[E2E] Fully-silent close: only timeline/webhook/workflow/SLA effects occur
[E2E] Silent bulk status change of N stale tickets: zero contact emails and zero survey invitations across the batch, including bundle children
[E2E] Grid board change end-to-end: reset, gate, batched Save succeeds; entry hero board-change behavior unchanged
[E2E] Grid resolution-close end-to-end (silent and non-silent) closes the ticket to the chosen status
[Regression] Full existing ticket-close, TICKET_UPDATED notification, and TicketInfo board-change test suites pass unchanged
